tools.name: prolog.query
tools.description: Execute a Prolog query and return results (first solution or all if requested).

tools.name: prolog.consult
tools.description: Load Prolog clauses into the knowledge base using assertz.

tools.name: prolog.retract
tools.description: Remove clauses from the Prolog knowledge base.

tools.name: prolog.status
tools.description: Get status of the Prolog engine and session.

session.notes: Server returns/updates session_id; client should forward any provided session_id in subsequent calls.
